parameters: The upstairs is my parents' room.
I don't have business with you.
No, I was just wondering what you were doing.
I'm watching Johnny's music live now, so don't bother me！
Hmph！ If Onii-chan were like Johnny's,
he should wear cool clothes and style his hair like that,
but he always wears such unfashionable clothes～
My clothes are fine... if you're going to say that, then \N[0003] is the same...
Oh, didn't you know？ \N[0003] Onii-chan is
saving up allowance from his part-time job to buy nice clothes because he doesn't want to wear
Onii-chan's clothes, that's why he's wearing them～？
No way！！ (I might borrow his clothes sometimes...)
Can we drop the subject of clothes already？ I want to watch TV！ Don't disturb me！
…Well, I guess it's time for bed today.
Are you watching Johnny's on TV again？
E-even if I am, it's fine, right？
I'm watching Johnny's music live now, so don't disturb me！
Onii-chan isn't losing out to him, is he？
Really, Onii-chan is so clumsy, he's totally different from Hayato-kun of Johnny's♪
\N[0001]Onii-chan's clothes are ugly and unlike Hayato-kun,
（Don't compare an idol to a normal high school student…）
…Well, I guess it's time for bed today.
Ah, \N[0003]Onii-chan, well, give me that snack！
I wanted to try that flavor！ Just one bite！ Okay？
I-I don't need it, even if…
So, why are you so down？
E-even if…that guy…my little sister…reacts so honestly, I-I'm not thinking he's cute or anything.
You don't have a girlfriend, so I don't want to hear it from you, big brother.
…Well, I guess it's time for bed today.

Well, how's school? You're attending my school this year, right?
Y-yes, but… I don't want to be thought of as your sibling at school,
Don't get in the way of my high school debut.
H-hey, how about the computer club？ I'm the president, you know…
No thanks！ I'm going to be in the student council！
Student council！？ Ah, you're joining such a strict organization…
No, tomorrow I'm exchanging homemade sweets with my friends！
Huh… so that's where this sweet smell is coming from…
Do you want to eat one, onii？ It's fine if I give you just one～？
So, well…I'll take you up on your offer…
Really！？ To be honest…I added some chopped sashimi as a secret ingredient！
What? You put sashimi in it?
Well, I think I'll go to bed…
…Well, I guess it's time for bed today.

Next time I'll buy you cake or something, okay！
Will you buy me Muji's Royal White Cake？
Aah～it's fine, it's fine, I'll buy it, I'll buy it！
(Wait a minute...Muji's cage costs over 1000 yen per piece, right...？)
…Well, I guess it's time for bed today.
Today is...the day I promised to meet Ayame-chan...
Ah！ Not at all！ I just got here too...
You're going to help me choose a PC today, right！
Yeah！ This is the least I can do to make it up to you...！
No way！ Choosing a PC was really difficult, so
Is that so...! I'm glad you feel that way, too.
So, let's go to a major specialty shop first！
Yes！ Thank you for your help！
Wow...there's a lot...there are a lot of machines！
They have a complete stock here, and
if we're lucky, we can take it home on the same day, so it's great, isn't it?
Yeah！ So, if we can take it home today,
I'll help you set up the PC today as an apology！
Yeah！ This is also part of my apology！
Thank you so much！ After buying a PC,
I've been worried about what to do next...
\N[0001]With you here, senpai, I'm not afraid of anything！
S-So…I'd like to hear your recommendations, Senpai \N[0001]！
Is there a particular manufacturer you think is good？
If I tailor it to Ayame-chan's intended use,
I think a customization like this would be good！
I-I see…I'm not sure if I understand or not…
Oh my…well, if this price is okay with you,
I'll go check on the stock, okay？ What do you say？
I think so too…if you've listened to my hopes and still recommend this,
then I think this will be fine！
You've even heard my detailed preferences…
\N[0001]Thanks to you, Senpai, the price is reasonable and I'm relieved…
When I tried to get a quote from the online shop by myself,
it ended up being a ridiculous total…
You mean…you went for full specs on everything, didn't you…
When I was choosing good components…it ended up being a three-digit number…
Oh my... w-well... so I've included the basic functions and,
so I'll go ask the store staff about it now！
Yes！ I'm so happy we can take it home on the same day！
Yeah, yeah, so after we buy the finer details...
Yes！ My mom and dad aren't home today,
so it's okay to make a bit of a fuss！
Is that so！ Alright, let's set up the PC quickly before your parents get back,
Hmm... l-let's see... yeah... it looks like we have all the necessary tools...
Alright, so I'll go ahead and set up the PC, so can you wait for a bit？
Yes！ If you need anything, please let me know！
Let's explore the room while collecting PC parts.
*Events will progress when you investigate specific locations.
Today is the day of the appointment with Kana-chan.
Sorry to keep you waiting～！ Did you wait for a long time？
You're not in uniform\N[0001]Senpai, you look quite simple today！！
D-do you think so…？ If it's weird, I'll buy something and change on the way…
No, no, no！！ That's not what I meant！！
\N[0001]You, Senpai, look quite good in simple clothes,
Actually, your face is well-proportioned, isn't it…！？
You're welcome～！ So, let's start helping Shibata-kun
Hmm… I wonder if clothes or something similar would be a safe choice？
Well...it's classic...I guess...But he's quite the stylish guy, so,
I think he buys his own clothes？
That's true～I think his casual wear is pretty stylish～！
So, maybe something other than clothes would be good？
As long as it's not too expensive.
Ah！ That's true！！ Accessories that match his clothes,
If you buy him a small item, he'll definitely be happy！
Yeah. He'll be happy to get it from his girlfriend, right！
As expected～\N[0001]You're looking at it from a different perspective～♪
D-Do you think so？ What did you think would be good, Kana-chan？
Um～I don't have a big budget...
I wonder if it would be a hindrance when he's messing around with his PC？
Personally, I think something like non-prescription glasses would be good！
Glasses?! Shibata-kun would look good in non-prescription glasses...
Right？ I don't think he has that kind of thing,
and it's good that it matches the clothes, isn't it？
Fake glasses aren't that expensive, so it's a good idea！
That's true！ Glasses might be a good idea！！
They also have glasses in this store, so shall we take a look around！
\N[0001]Senpai, please be a model for glasses！
Um, is it okay if I'm the model...
Fuh～ I was able to make a good purchase～
I'm glad we were able to buy something that suits Shibata！
...There's still time, so shall we take it easy at a cafe for a bit？
Yes！ Since I invited you out！ You know？ Come on！ Let's go～！
Fuh～ The iced cocoa is delicious～
Yeah, I kind of like coffee.
Would you like to try some coffee too, Kana-chan？ It's mine, but you're welcome to it.
Hmm... coffee is bitter, right? I wonder if I can drink it deliciously...
So, I'll add milk and sugar and make it café au lait...
Ehh！ Are you making it café au lait just for me！？
It's fine？ Even if. Here, try drinking it？
But the sweetness and milk are really making it delicious, aren't they～
Is that so～... I like the bitter scent of coffee...
I hope that one day you'll understand it too, Kana-chan...
Ah！ But I do understand the goodness of coffee's aroma！！
I like coffee-flavored sweets, after all♪
With a lot of sugar, right？
But, compared to the senpai who was drinking black coffee until a while ago,\N[0001]
you smell like the sophisticated scent of coffee～
"You can't drink it anywhere except the family restaurant's drink bar！"
Ah... indeed, when it comes to melon soda,
the image is that it's only available at family restaurants.
I wonder why...？ If they sold it normally, I'd buy it, though！
my little sister loves melon soda, I often see her drinking it...
Ehh! \N[0001] senpai has a little sister??
Yeah, she's the same age as Kana-chan, just in a different class,
so I think they're classmates in the same year！
Ehh！！ Really?！ I hope I can meet her somewhere♪
No way, my little sister is pretty cheeky, though...
I wish Kana-chan was my little sister...
S-such a thing... me, I'm just noisy, you know...
But if \N[0001] senpai was onii-san, you're good at PC, too,
so I think I can rely on you~！
Well, if I'm the older brother, Kana-chan's boyfriend Shibata is,
But, based on appearance alone, he looks flirty.
I won't accept Onii-chan as a good guy！
T-, that's true... Shibata-kun's appearance and personality are quite different, aren't they...
Depending on how you look at it, his personality might seem flirty too...
U～n... maybe it's because of the way he talks...！
Right, right... but he likes computers and is serious about club activities,
I can tell he's a good guy.
I think so too！ At first, I thought this guy was flirty...
But as I talked to him, I realized he's unexpectedly serious...
And then I started to like him♪
Is that so? Well, he's a junior I'm taking care of, after all！
He's gotta be a good guy♪
If you're saying that, then \N[0001]senpai is the best guy！ Captain！
Ahahaha... that's not what I meant, though...
Ah, you're done drinking all my coffee while we're talking...
Ah！ You're right... When I'm talking to you, Senpai, I get caught up in the conversation and,
I ended up drinking it... I'll order a new one again！
No, it's fine. It's getting to be a good time,
so if you're okay with it, Kana-chan, I think it's fine to break up.
Yeah... I think so too, Senpai！
It's not good to stay up too late, either...！
Well, if we've finished drinking this iced cocoa too, shall we go！
I had a lot of fun today～
Gah！！ Onii-chan is smiling or something...
Also, your phone's vibration is annoying, so answer it！
I-it's Kana-chan... What should I say in response？
I wonder if it's Kana-chan's birthday next time？

It starts with the Ayabe Maho route at first.
When you clear the Maho route, the remaining routes for both of you will be unlocked,
and you can play them in any order you like.
Also, when you raise your little sister's affection level,
the sister route will be unlocked when the affection level reaches 100.
About the flow of a day
The flow of a day is either a pattern that progresses automatically through events,
or a pattern where time passes when you sleep in bed.
If you can't find any events in particular, try sleeping in bed.
Sometimes, students at school will tell you where events are held.
If you can't find an event for a while,
During the event, as the event progresses,
you will receive messages from the girl,
and you can send messages back.
The affection level that rises varies depending on the response.
There will be times when the event enters Exploration Mode.
During Exploration Mode, the walkable area is limited.
Places with events or places that can be investigated
During Exploration Mode, investigating specific locations will progress the event.
Upon meeting the girl, the Ero Status will be unlocked.
About unlocking all CG and recollections
You can unlock them by selecting 'Unlock All' from the menu.
